name: Madison, MJ Hegar Finance HQ
subject: How we win in November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Every donation gets us closer to Senator MJ Hegar.

|

[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901d1/7f51f7bc/4e86f82e/4ef6ea48/1993845375/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | **Peter -- Every time you[give to this campaign,](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901d1/7f51f7bc/4e86f82e/4ef6ea4f/1993845375/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200615.2nd__1553__&amount=10") your donation becomes another stepping stone on our path to defeating Senator Cornyn.** Here are some of the ways we'll use your contribution:
1. We can run **more TV and digital ads that reach undecided voters** across Texas. With 34% of Texans undecided in this election, we need to make sure they're hearing MJ's message.
2. We can fund virtual outreach tools like **dialers for phone banks or software for virtual town halls.**
3. We can support allies' **voter registration programs to get over 2 million Texans registered.**

**[DONATE TO FLIP TEXAS](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901d1/7f51f7bc/4e86f82e/4ef6ea4f/1993845375/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200615.2nd__1553__&amount=10")** We're down to the wire, with less than a month until the primary runoff election. MJ is our _best_ chance to defeat Sen. Cornyn, so we can't stop now! We need to push as hard as we can to register voters and reach those critical undecided Texans with information about how MJ is going to expand health care access, protect workers' rights, and fight against the corruption of big money in politics.

**Flipping Texas depends on what we do today.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Joshua Scott for Congress
subject: Joshua Scott Campaign Update
body:
Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=i13mnUuRG2fBCP.&b=BYY7XDyEIrkseXgQ1eu3kA

Peter

Since the primary election, and over the last several weeks, it is a shame that we have not been able to maximize our time discussing policy to bring peace and prosperity to the citizens of District 32. Instead, we first spent our time combatting media fear-mongering and our local government's nonsensical arbitrary policies on what is essential and what is not. Now, we are spending our time reassuring friends and supporters that despite a vicious campaign of cyber-bullying, lies about our brave police officers, and violent riots, all being ushered in by anti-American hate groups - we live in the greatest country on Earth, and they have absolutely NOTHING to apologize for.

My advice to you is the same. Stand tall. Smile. All is well! Remember, those of us patriots in California are campaigning in deep blue areas with embedded incumbents and activists in the media supporting them. Flipping Los Angeles County and the state of California literally means that millions of voters have to witness the destructive anti-American sentiment of the radical left for themselves, and that is exactly what is occurring right now. Thus, I am sleeping well at night knowing our great country has quite a bright future, and so should you!

Even with all of the hyped up social tensions currently ongoing, we are making connections and friends all throughout the district, and gaining momentum daily. Although we can't be executing our robust ground game and door-knocking that we had planned for, we are meeting up, talking shop, and most importantly, getting everyone out of the house for some much needed fresh air after being cooped up for two months.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=i13mnUuRG2fBCP.&b=BYY7XDyEIrkseXgQ1eu3kA

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=i13mnUuRG2fBCP.&b=BYY7XDyEIrkseXgQ1eu3kA

If you have had enough of the garbage you see on TV and social media daily, and want to support a cause that is not afraid to push back against the narrative, then our campaign is the place for you. I can't wait until we can get back to discussing conservative policy, but until then, stay focused and stand tall for what you believe in, with absolutely no apologies.

Joshua Scott

www.votejoshuascott.org

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=i13mnUuRG2fBCP.&b=BYY7XDyEIrkseXgQ1eu3kA

info@votejoshuascott.org

(626) 214-5406

Donate

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=i13mnUuRG2fBCP.&b=I3P.BU0lMvoE.xvkX70RQA

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=i13mnUuRG2fBCP.&b=6At1SZKXp.5AIHIzezJiUw

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=i13mnUuRG2fBCP.&b=vHIYlqaGNTipPeKKKkD6pg

name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Check-Up with Dr. Manny 6/15
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
[](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkjilikk-olhhkyhhid-y/)
---
| |
---|---|---
| Friends, I've had another great week on the road visiting every corner of the state and talking about the issues that matter with conservatives. This past week back on the road, I enjoyed spending time in Madison, Chester, Shelby, Lauderdale, Lake, Dyer, Obion, Weakley, Grainger, Sevier, and Knox Counties. I hope you'll join me at one of this week's townhalls or the next one near you. Once again over the past week, I'm continuing to hear about the concern over domestic terrorist organizations such as ANTIFA, and their looting and rioting. I stand with all law enforcement and support them. What is also concerning is the liberal hypocrisy that we are seeing at every corner. You can't go to church, but this looting and rioting is okay? [Watch my new ad here!](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkjilikk-olhhkyhhid-j/) [](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkjilikk-olhhkyhhid-t/) **Events:** This week, I'll be doing townhalls in Marion, Dickson, Warren, White, and Hamblen Counties, before ending Saturday with friends at the Hawkins County Reagan Day Dinner. I'll be sharing why I'm running for Senate and taking your questions. I hope you'll join us! Stay up to date with where we'll be next at [DrMannyForSenate.com/Events](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkjilikk-olhhkyhhid-i/). **News:** Last week, I was incredibly proud to receive my good friend Senator Janice Bowling's endorsement. I've known Senator Bowling for a long time and she has stood by my side from day one of this campaign. I'm honored to be supported by her, and great conservatives from around the state. This race is Tennessee versus DC, and I'm humbled to have the outpouring of support from Tennesseans like Senator Bowling. **Social Media:** Thank you to the folks that came out to our townhalls last week to support me and my run for US Senate. We had many great crowds just like this one in Sevier County. It's going to be a great Summer and I look forward to seeing you out on the road! Keep an eye on our [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkjilikk-olhhkyhhid-d/) and [drmannyforsenate.com/events](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkjilikk-olhhkyhhid-h/) to see where I'll be going next! Follow us on [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkjilikk-olhhkyhhid-k/), [Twitter](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkjilikk-olhhkyhhid-u/), and [Instagram](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkjilikk-olhhkyhhid-o/) to keep up with all that we are doing during this pandemic. We aren't slowing this campaign down as we work towards victory in August! I believe Tennesseans should meet their next US Senator, and why I hope to see you soon. Dr. Manny P.S. There are only 52 days until Election Day![ A donation right now will help me reach the US Senate and be a true representative of YOU, instead of a Washington insider. ](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkjilikk-olhhkyhhid-b/) [DoNATe herE](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkjilikk-olhhkyhhid-n/) Copyright © 2019 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205 |

Friend,

Five years ago today, I rode down the escalator at Trump Tower in New York and launched my 2016 Presidential Campaign.

Here we are on what marks an absolutely HISTORIC day for our movement, and I want to do something so HUGE that even the Do Nothing Democrats and the radical media won’t be able to ignore us.

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=a2db1e377c7f69f4e6a20f0237a795b29e51c10256ba57113a7287757cfd713e42bef288667bc0f48e8bce0e677801f5b0d1fd9691174e7a
I’m upping our Mid-Month Goal to $15 MILLION! >>
For a short time, when you make your NEXT CONTRIBUTION, not only will it be 500%-MATCHED, but you will cement your name in history as an Official 2020 Trump Presidential Founder.

I noticed you haven’t contributed to our movement yet, but I really need you to step up. This group will be remembered as the heart of our 2020 victory, but we won’t win without you.

| Friends, Yesterday, Matt announced another HUGE endorsement by a great New Hampshire conservative leader,**and the man who coined the phrase, "the New Hampshire Advantage!" former NH Governor Steve Merrill!** Governor Merrill has spent his life fighting to protect New Hampshire's conservative values from liberals like Chris Pappas. He knows exactly what it takes to beat them and we couldn't be more proud to have his support. [Will you join Governor Steve Merrill on Team Mayberry by pledging $25, $50 or even $100 to our campaign to send a true New Hampshire conservative to Washington?](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDQ0ODQ0NjgyOTY5MzU1NTA4JmM9aThoMCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTkxOTU5NjgmZD1oNXQzbTJ2.1NWhHcDE4ykkG9qNBfxku_s38gNby0wTPAKXPOK9jZE) **
**
---
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Statement by Governor Merrill: I proudly endorse Matt Mayberry for Congress. For 30 years I have watched him work tirelessly for New Hampshire’s values and principles. Matt is the real thing. His life is built around service to others. He served in the military, on his local city council and school board, and was appointed by Gov. Chris Sununu to the Human Rights Commission. As Vice Chair of our party he attended 330 events in 17 months. New Hampshire voters can count on Matt to represent our interests, not the interests of the permanent political class in Washington who are there to serve their own agenda, not ours. I made ‘The New Hampshire Advantage’ the cornerstone of my years as Governor because it is our citizens that make our state special. We know that liberal federal government programs always come with a price tag attached. That is why Americans put the Congress at an all-time low for getting things done and working for them. In contrast, Matt embodies The New Hampshire Advantage by volunteering with the Salvation Army, Meals on Wheels, and other programs to feed low income children. Matt won’t be learning on the job. We need a Congressman with deep New Hampshire roots. Matt cares. As an Air Force veteran, I am particularly proud of Matt’s advocacy for active duty military families and helping our veteran community. Matt’s conservative values are what the Congress needs. As a Manchester resident, I will be proud to have Matt represent all of us with honor and integrity. And so will you, I assure you. Please join me in electing Matt Mayberry to Congress. Gov. Steve Merrill

|
#
Last night, we faced a critical fundraising deadline. But with the way things were looking, we decided to extend the deadline by 24 hours to hit our goal. Let me explain what that means for our campaign: If we miss our goal now, I’m afraid we will risk reporting weak numbers to the Federal Election Commission on June 30. And once our report goes public shortly after, everyone from our opponent to Donald Trump to Mitch McConnell will know we’re vulnerable in this race. Any sign of weakness — _like a missed fundraising goal this important!_ — can lead to a barrage of right-wing attacks and outside spending to defeat us. That’s on top of the millions of dollars these guys are already dumping into Senate races across the country. I hope that explains the situation for you — and why I need to ask: **Will you rush a donation of $10 or more toward our emergency 24-hour fundraising goal? We can’t afford to lose this Senate seat, and we sure as heck can’t afford to let Trump win our state. | Friends, Yesterday, **Denise Ricciardi (R-Bedford), one of New Hampshire's brightest, new State Senate candidates** was named to the Republican State Legislative Committee's "Candidate Spotlight" program! This is a BIG deal for Denise's campaign to unseat Jeanne Dietsch (D-Peterborough) and help us win back the majority in the Senate! Denise is only the second NH candidate _ever_ named to this program.

name: Corky Messner
subject: The Democrats are getting scared
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Jeanne Shaheen’s friends tweeted their support, but they already sound nervous. Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e529430fb8d1bfa7/afa49f9ff80a99dbc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, The Democrats are coming out in full force to support Jeanne Shaheen in New Hampshire. They are desperate to flip the Senate blue, and they know that if I beat her in this race, there will be no chance of that happening. Ever since President Trump endorsed my campaign, D.C. Jeanne’s liberal friends in the Senate have been announcing their support for her. **Former Secretary of State John Kerry, Senators Amy Klobuchar, Chris Murphy, Doug Jones, and Brian Schatz all tweeted their support for Jeanne. It’s clear they are scared**. Just look at some of the things they tweeted: id:2020-06-10-19:31:31:198t [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e529430fb8d1bfa7/a243dfe6f8097808c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e529430fb8d1bfa7/370de0646e91ca7dc3d6b838967d376c/33153) They knowingly admit they “can’t win the Senate without holding New Hampshire.” But it is time for a change. The president endorsed me because he knows I’m the Republican who can win and unseat Jeanne Shaheen. Ms. Klobuchar may think “New Hampshire is Shaheen Country,” but last time I checked, this was America. And Granite State Americans are ready to Drain the Swamp. I’m not a career politician. I’m an outsider and a businessman, just like President Trump, and I will proudly stand with him and work hard to Keep America Great! **[Will you stand with President Trump and support my campaign by donating $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or what you can NOW?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e529430fb8d1bfa7/46ee71702703f88fc3d6b838967d376c/33153)** This is going to be a tough race. Jeanne’s socialist friends are going to pull out all the stops to try and get her reelected. New Hampshire and America cannot afford another six years of Senator Shaheen. It’s past time for her retirement. Can I count on your help? Thanks for you support,
Corky Messner [Retire Jeanne Shaheen! Donate $5 >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e529430fb8d1bfa7/217920e262c180dfc3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Retire Jeanne Shaheen! body:
We are officially one week from Election Day! That means just seven more days of phone-banking, text-banking, friend-banking, and getting the word out to every voter in NY-17 | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zY5UUulMfqefvlidzUvD0URg0qjwhwNLWvIFywz5Lt4SLACHkg_YxvsaBno4A-xKlB71zNRqbnBSulNGJHTQqNWT-Cl-Mp4PTjsgBZfJHUkiWgYGdU72Gt1Ay9Hu112BG9E1zGNC1XVNaPE3AVmrffMxJffYvTD1XMzQypdPTHMCqAS4JCVLCctyJLVlkX7kTroN0YYJWjVZZN5r2IudLB6dx3NgXL-N_lZYW5ukvMDzHoXg1_BHgh9aXJHLE6PtG1ZgbPRpMFXGS-Rs_SiNqE/32o/dzwhP5WORHKirAftQ2I2JQ/h0/auHvpBHhmgJxkMl4s8Afel3lb_QhVClN9evGMA5Rayk) Friend,
We are officially one week from Election Day! That means just seven more days of phone-banking, text-banking, friend-banking, and getting the word out to every voter in NY-17 to vote for Mondaire!
On Sunday, our campaign manager, Charlie, told you about our ambitious goal to raise $150,000 in the last full week of the campaign. As of right now, we have raised $69,810 for the week, meaning we are **_almost halfway to our goal_**.
On Friday, we’ll be placing the final TV buy of the campaign. name: Chris Jacobs
subject: Final Reminder! Day of Action with VIP Guest Kimberly Guilfoyle
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Dear Friend, Don't miss our rally with Trump Senior Advisor Kimberly Guilfoyle - _**Tonight - June 16th at 5:30 pm. It is not too late to RSVP!**_ Please join me, NYGOP State Chairman Nick Langworthy, _**and our VIP guest - Senior Advisor to the Trump 2020 Campaign - Kimberly Guilfoyle TONIGHT at 5:30 PM EST.**_
_**[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/4wRtwHYuCvNtMpTuVjg2wA/xfPueVE7qanYt927Qg182A)**_ _****_ With the election less than two weeks away, we are calling on all volunteers to help our campaign contact voters all across NY27 and tell them _**Chris Jacobs has our President 's full support and endorsement for the Primary and Special Election on June 23rd. **_ The elections on June 23rd are critical to ensuring that we get strong, conservative, and experienced leadership for Western New York in Congress, and **the President and I need your help.** Join us for an exciting night on Tuesday and reserve your chance to hear from both NYGOP State Chairman Nick Langworthy and _**Trump 2020 Senior Campaign Advisor Kimberly Guilfoyle!**_ This is all hands-on deck, and your support will make sure we bring in two big wins on June 23rd. **Please RSVP by TODAY, June 16th, at 2:00 PM EST.** [You can RSVP online now by clicking here.](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/dfo5v6C5XqL6WmLjhekXIw/xfPueVE7qanYt927Qg182A) Whether you're an experienced campaigner or looking to get started, please join us! _**All are welcome and comprehensive training will be provided. **_

I look forward to seeing you TONIGHT and thank you for your continued support!

Best,
Chris Jacobs

We’re halfway through June -- which means that the end of the financial quarter is right around the corner. We are building a movement that can flip Kansas’ Senate seat in November, but the only way we can win is if we double down and finish this quarter with our best numbers yet.

|

We are building a movement that can flip Kansas’ Senate seat in November, but the only way we can win is if we double down and finish this quarter with our best numbers yet. **That’s why I’m setting a $20,000 mid-month fundraising goal and asking for your support:** [**Team, will you pitch in $5 now to help me meet this crucial goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17892477/210110872/-1143211903?refcode=em200615i&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODZmZjBkZS1mZGFmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UcRFoiRTrmUD21d865lXJzs7rlAgY4i2zeGfp_AqUfc=) The polls show that this race is neck-and-neck and that winning in Kansas is within our reach. name: Mike Siegel
subject: re: Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE SIEGEL FOR CONGRESS](https://click
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17892517/210113297/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmI0OTI5ZC1mZWFmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YhCUJLakq1I-c51DsCudmQGMwf5l7pT8f9F6EmnaJo0=&emci=f9b3929d-feaf-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=02b4929d-feaf-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=6233172)
---
Peter, **These are extraordinary, difficult times. We are under attack on every front.** And yet we find reasons for hope. Yesterday was an amazing example: the highest court in the land, the United States Supreme Court, for the first time ruled that LGBT Americans are protected by the Civil Rights Act of 1964. As a society, we are only as strong as our most vulnerable community members. And our legal system is only as just as our least protected Americans. **Which is why yesterday’s decision is so important, for so many people. Here is what the Court wrote in Bostock v. Clayton County, Georgia:** _In Title VII, Congress adopted broad language making it illegal for an employer to rely on an employee’s sex when deciding to fire that employee. We do not hesitate to recognize today a necessary consequence of that legislative choice: An employer who fires an individual merely for being gay or transgender defies the law._ Prior to Bostock, employers could use “religious reasons” to justify discrimination against gay, lesbian and transgender employees. Now, workers have a remedy in federal court when they face discrimination and harassment in the workplace. And Bostock opens the door for future victories, in the fight for true equality under the law. We celebrate this amazing decision. And we are celebrating a great run in this campaign. This month, we’ve announced a slate of new endorsements, including Congresswoman Veronica Escobar and Senator Bernie Sanders, adding to our broad support from across the district and country! The momentum is showing in our voter contact efforts, as we identify thousands of new supporters. **And last week alone we raised $70,000 — a record for this campaign!** We are in the middle of a great struggle as a society, and this campaign is committed to lifting up every community in the Texas 10th. Thank you for being a part of this work. Let’s keep winning victories, big and small. And let’s keep sharing hope in these uncertain times. In this fight with you,
Mike Siegel

clean_body: Peter, These are extraordinary, difficult times. We are under attack on every front. And yet we find reasons for hope. Yesterday was an amazing example: the highest court in the land, the United States Supreme Court, for the first time ruled that LGBT Americans are protected by the Civil Rights Act of 1964. As a society, we are only as strong as our most vulnerable community members. And our legal system is only as just as our least protected Americans. Which is why yesterday’s decision is so important, for so many people. Here is what the Court wrote in Bostock v. Clayton County, Georgia: In Title VII, Congress adopted broad language making it illegal for an employer to rely on an employee’s sex when deciding to fire that employee. We do not hesitate to recognize today a necessary consequence of that legislative choice: An employer who fires an individual merely for being gay or transgender defies the law. Prior to Bostock, employers could use “religious reasons” to justify discrimination against gay, lesbian and transgender employees. Now, workers have a remedy in federal court when they face discrimination and harassment in the workplace. And Bostock opens the door for future victories, in the fight for true equality under the law. We celebrate this amazing decision. And we are celebrating a great run in this campaign. This month, we’ve announced a slate of new endorsements, including Congresswoman Veronica Escobar and Senator Bernie Sanders, adding to our broad support from across the district and country! The momentum is showing in our voter contact efforts, as we identify thousands of new supporters. And last week alone we raised $70,000 — a record for this campaign! We are in the middle of a great struggle as a society, and this campaign is committed to lifting up every community in the Texas 10th. Thank you for being a part of this work. Let’s keep winning victories, big and small. And let’s keep sharing hope in these uncertain times. In this fight with you, Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

leadership must come before politics

| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: When You Defund the Police, You Destabilize Urban Communities
body:
Stripping resources away from local law enforcement will lead to animosity, lawlessness and have a disproportionate impact on urban communities. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=77266a6640&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# When You Defund the Police, You Destabilize Urban Communities

“Defunding America’s police departments is dangerous. Stripping resources away from local law enforcement will lead to animosity, increased lawlessness and have a disproportionate impact on urban communities that actually need them the most in a truly devastating fashion,” Paris Dennard writes for _The Daily Caller_.

Surveys of urban communities show residents generally want more policing, not less. That includes 68 percent of Chicagoans in low-income neighborhoods, for example.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=288eaf623d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “As public health officials warn of a new surge in coronavirus cases following mass protests in densely populated cities, the New York City mayor’s office has instructed its contact tracing team not to ask tested individuals if they participated in the crowded demonstrations,” Tristan Justice reports for [_The Federalist_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=35c18771c1&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Melania Trump wants to use art to help children learn about women’s suffrage. The first lady on Monday announced a youth art project to coincide with the ratification nearly 100 years ago of the constitutional amendment that granted women the right to vote,” Darlene Superville reports for [_The Associated Press_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=81254801bd&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| U.S. retail sales in May saw the largest monthly jump in history. “Consumers freed from the coronavirus-induced lockdowns began shopping again. clean_body: Stripping resources away from local law enforcement will lead to animosity, lawlessness and have a disproportionate impact on urban communities. | | | | | | | When You Defund the Police, You Destabilize Urban Communities “Defunding America’s police departments is dangerous. Stripping resources away from local law enforcement will lead to animosity, increased lawlessness and have a disproportionate impact on urban communities that actually need them the most in a truly devastating fashion,” Paris Dennard writes for The Daily Caller. Surveys of urban communities show residents generally want more policing, not less. That includes 68 percent of Chicagoans in low-income neighborhoods, for example. | | “As public health officials warn of a new surge in coronavirus cases following mass protests in densely populated cities, the New York City mayor’s office has instructed its contact tracing team not to ask tested individuals if they participated in the crowded demonstrations,” Tristan Justice reports for . | | “Melania Trump wants to use art to help children learn about women’s suffrage. body:
We need his continued leadership in Washington state.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/1?t=3&akid=8066%2E868730%2EiEsjvo) Friend, Washington Governor Jay Inslee is up for re-election this year and I'm asking you to join me in supporting his campaign. Here's why: In Washington, we were one of the first states to confront COVID-19. While the Trump administration has struggled to scale up testing capacity and meet the challenges of this moment, Jay has demonstrated steady and capable leadership. He's listened to the experts to protect public health and safety and he's taken quick action to help families cope with the financial impact of this crisis. **[We need Governor Jay Inslee's continued leadership in Washington state. Can you contribute $5 to his re-election campaign now?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8799?t=4&akid=8066%2E868730%2EiEsjvo)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8800?t=5&akid=8066%2E868730%2EiEsjvo)

name: Defeat Disinfo
subject: 1 in 25 live here. 1 in 4 die here
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0wrDB7MtwPLuSSi4jwn1dr2AEKKvrxXLDWyyWUDJ9fIh3cA_yNrSXYaQXjbaKQCTUlofLJ4kmaD8hMQQrIvoxrfFVwq_P1_jqnJRrojYnzMTCEp3XkeuTkUmEn7EGRp-8gEOO7CBlFudNsEchVHV5DvDBYVJNbC2UCX94naWchgdVEvxIf6Bp02P3Qhtx4yNzUAgJYgLKPZc9OkPZ5sbSROro67zaK51irAhA-ll91TVRZBAMiXmByMZCwhBOrIdT5LKdl2-OCwpqCT88_JyM7E/32o/bFOhByHETuaK9AMM8QlwUA/h0/Vi_scNhtCSLoR-NeM5cJsQiIC8EqbGZ1Ol19hh8y_98) We’re at an inflection point, Team.

Look around — you’ll see a nation wielding its power to effect change — and Trump sees it too.

He’s getting desperate and scrambling to distract from his many failures. Yesterday, using a few of his favorite adjectives, he came up with something: _More Coronavirus cases isn’t bad news, it shows how much bigger and better our test kits are than the rest of the world’s!!!!_

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0n5Qb5xjaWQ-ETscSkvkipoQ6rgchbOKq9TS-mBWTCzAorJK8Qj9CEuZGGXU8aQ9puAXhg1HbftDh0Kl9nzy6sttQ-DA2q6o_7yoa1DMHCokXTotvH3SlZ7_EiubefBZu5zR9lV9wrZVJcnPoxAU_dxlWTHflkfb79rdCd6S1bExz0GCFOswenhTv4IWsZMFjIQ7aIrG4o7LdAO19OroieAvC1oPKgkV4OnAJ2qLpe79LQwarAfUYjLhkGH_tnCdE-bjwtse5n3dxe0rcuVQ7oY/32o/bFOhByHETuaK9AMM8QlwUA/h1/3RX7mR8JN5cyxV8PCamYeMyG8wu_xMV3ZoGHOwYqxMg) But “big testing” doesn't explain why America is “bigger” in a different category: deaths. 1 in every 25 people live in America, but 1 in every 4 COVID-19 victims died here.*

It’s **distract** and **deflect** at their finest: half-baked and beside the point.

The American people know better. When they see words like “bigger” in a Trump tweet, they can tell the truth is being stretched — or thrown out the window.

In reality, people are scared about this virus. There may be more tests, but tests can’t save the sick or vaccinate the healthy.

**[The numbers don’t lie, Americans are dying from COVID-19 at higher rates than anywhere in the world. Share this message from a retired union worker from Michigan so Trump and his base know that everyday Americans can see through his lies.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJjY49n83ivj1JpSpcqTpqmvia6jrTzqXMjruKi1JwYJ1lt1Np5dohw74Ak2tKB5rbAVDwLGf4iNhOe2Q7uVxF02oHLDclvVMFcv0T43wH6Kzo2FUe4ogKe9J1PcVX6TIHYwxKiaNQBAW0l2l-ufkFSLuUOsq-rDxccFuLiuBKQUnwW9EKpBNDuQrsXaDMJHYq176G6v96pQ2-JBLmasYjhDx_Es8eMzO_7B7spdv9q0PDItCXpsSq1BJGSSakRhIQRosREnQNwiSLQCHf557nvyjkSKdy8vZ3_IVwrZaiHVA/32o/bFOhByHETuaK9AMM8QlwUA/h2/_dFIx1DQ99tr8KcoCN1Z4MfPMtcBQ7TQ3QVB4syOdr0)**

[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJjY49n83ivj1JpSpcqTpqmvia6jrTzqXMjruKi1JwYJ7WbzIQ7hlR3sBOmDZTY6lK1nXcM1ITprOjDdndiLyxsx8QiOGoxQMGsU5P-6U-oSdGeFjBGLr-enk0FdhpetQONLbB2zrcol-ITImPTbwpf-BZ9Hb_1K_hPYTRWXLqHkdg8IrxNCr88UUQEw6XrqEQg7cep8bIPxIodYUecW1HKtw_56sKJMDNGbAp4kkAekjfIoRkV112MbP4jWrr9qUb_tCZrnltIoaHhRG4TDW064YQfB8O5wHA3rEYAvvAMPQ/32o/bFOhByHETuaK9AMM8QlwUA/h3/ePLMWu3SnnTbyGN5jsKadroYQcgha93U1buQQ3_I6XY) Trump’s odds of a second term are slipping away and he knows it. We can’t let him downplay the numbers by boasting about the **bigness** of American test kits. He needs to know that people are still dying and it’s happening on his watch.

******[Keep Trump on the hot seat so he keeps grasping at straws and his approval rating keeps sinking. Share this post so he knows we’re not distracted.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJjY49n83ivj1JpSpcqTpqmvia6jrTzqXMjruKi1JwYJ5YGmA7EOdjJYOGr6I_mIsFNuaY5vA8uhjbRuTaE_KHZA5ETN2RiHnEl1_Lm12GsdvwkvPy1iLnF88M8h8l1HVCdc5TRSq-d8SsBYdKsYO2g7KbFzkq52AhRVjucj6AukXNbGRNc4yKCixcE9u9_p5emqTjfjdHQ8gejU0mmJEYNONr9WnZmCTXhPoeMbe-yXxXuGYBl7mt75VmShuAiW3OAzVYwqS6Wtwj0rBlN8i6c8aTGCXITNGG68Rk3oKhvVQ/32o/bFOhByHETuaK9AMM8QlwUA/h4/LrEM8gn53qf5hWBlybrJA3_8_F3pYu6os4lPr-J6s7o)**

The Defeat Disinfo Team

P.S. Fighting against Trump’s disinformation campaigns costs money, **[and a contribution of $5 goes a long way to electing a real leader and starting to repair our nation come November.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xIsbYIYAaDaVM0NszyqqPOpuVE5NHWilB7LmOdivvZkSgtGNjzNKu2nazOkIBbRgN3rAZE9d_NmAwCSUhXPaLDO3fYY1Gp0r-8Hz6TR9vurqO6a7AWM2QvfqnXMAaHnro8a5jqDBYL0TPv8dVo9XOjqeXdktQkKtgJCcVuKgB2AKJtKEgBhPaL1L96Nrv92Qr7sAcaM5Q_633XkqrDmLrVVXYzkX9lEfCqKREfaoU-Mz8kK7-FXPGm5zDN65RlaDBAbwpdLk3Cs_HHyGF9tAnEoYd7_DoS6x2eSYhwrtWk2hEZGXem4eBTFvwNSOLkBAe6yuvW2YE0T4I8XNl3yAhuLBSQ4_QKHyXmotfP1hV9Q3I-GEQ9CIglK-VogGKahwLcAO3OlbuT4_gZKD1KoIj2/32o/bFOhByHETuaK9AMM8QlwUA/h5/x29KRUW06cDn14u87Nm579sOTidmugtmJJYnzECkDaA)**

clean_body: | | | We’re at an inflection point, Team. Look around — you’ll see a nation wielding its power to effect change — and Trump sees it too. He’s getting desperate and scrambling to distract from his many failures. Yesterday, using a few of his favorite adjectives, he came up with something: More Coronavirus cases isn’t bad news, it shows how much bigger and better our test kits are than the rest of the world’s!!!! But “big testing” doesn't explain why America is “bigger” in a different category: deaths. 1 in every 25 people live in America, but 1 in every 4 COVID-19 victims died here. It’s distract and deflect at their finest: half-baked and beside the point. The American people know better. When they see words like “bigger” in a Trump tweet, they can tell the truth is being stretched — or thrown out the window. In reality, people are scared about this virus. There may be more tests, but tests can’t save the sick or vaccinate the healthy. Trump’s odds of a second term are slipping away and he knows it. We can’t let him downplay the numbers by boasting about the bigness of American test kits. He needs to know that people are still dying and it’s happening on his watch. ** The Defeat Disinfo Team P.S. Fighting against Trump’s disinformation campaigns costs money, *According to the latest daily situation report from the World Health Organization (WHO). If you were forwarded this email, you can subscribe to receive these weekly action updates on how to fight Trump's lies. | | Sent via . _Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

name: Nick
subject: about defunding our police
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas, Inc
body:
Friend, There’s a lot of conversation going around right now about defunding the police. Of course, what happened in Minnesota was a terrible tragedy, and we must do absolutely everything we can to prevent it from happening again. _But defunding the police is**NOT** the answer._ **[Step up and add your name to STOP the movement to defund our police>>>](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=34bc9b0c74114ab9a1bc9d8478eeab26&_e=BhIlkpNJGVTT0IrludbqOUwLpsMx3wrCE8psTHBR1Zn2m5kLiu3QkPpQFSVT_-px-OzLN8Zd_2sJsl8s99XaTO5L3jNE5X5LB2guVbnVRSSfAbJWzIuefz_aCKLJ3Y6DQiJqW1kBoN5ZoUws4fDFFVjThmeqQnuLIOJj-amQXwLc0GKqS_1KyqFbtvZe_0H2ppvJFdMmVoYerRmu3zs9TNG6qaRSTfmedpBEek48-XOCPhFUCMIBLsLNmjjeaEZGhkxWjl8BbGGTrYBcH_ohM4xlpAkynJ2HKFYidvNOZGWsc3VuaEtWaFPM6yxIaHbIKqmRa0WZKdQKmlklwTbLdxMPIn7Qn4IYWzuKXmmgX1w0D-uHptnXLFi44hXuQ6rhwD8qXchjOpWphvaM2jvRMryc9deJDHWJok6GK39U5Fs%3D)** Our police force puts their lives on the line every day to keep us safe. Across this nation we have seen what happens when violent groups like ANTIFA take over and vandalize, loot, and destroy our communities. That’s why it’s imperative that we stand up and support our local police and the hard work they do. Our neighborhoods and communities cannot afford to lose our officers. So, I’m asking for you to stand with me right now and Add your name to STOP the defunding the police movement. [**Add Your Name**](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=34bc9b0c74114ab9a1bc9d8478eeab26&_e=BhIlkpNJGVTT0IrludbqOUwLpsMx3wrCE8psTHBR1Zn2m5kLiu3QkPpQFSVT_-px-OzLN8Zd_2sJsl8s99XaTO5L3jNE5X5LB2guVbnVRSSfAbJWzIuefz_aCKLJ3Y6DQiJqW1kBoN5ZoUws4fDFFVjThmeqQnuLIOJj-amQXwLc0GKqS_1KyqFbtvZe_0H2qN-FRzzpJIz4M4VXAJouvvi6yWcL5ieYgPnW9JeV7yetdHz-8aCfTjRhGW-BgzKSdt6eceDcYIIGo-No0Vy4aF_6Sl5VE-y5pF0hXcOw_zwVHEXzGf2bkOYEqUVjnuMInEmVm4NHSIxsla8q13fnkqIsUFGHLVDSnYwSdDTu7AqtV9HzxvD-6uAqjpJbuK9hIiPxS_2KK2GvDNdp5uY-WOzAMEnoVvfkfGK7-SBkI08%3D) Hope I can count on your support, Nick Freitas [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=34bc9b0c74114ab9a1bc9d8478eeab26&_e=BhIlkpNJGVTT0IrludbqOQ_JTCG0WkJQJZfxqDcOmpVdqWSAdw2A96CXNMMucsAMRnu8BiT-Y3kPyW0QQdQOS0w9CfcWZMDQE3HsyETD4A79FLp3HSzNfQrdOmkgmPLX6H-fzYSOo0jDRE6gn0dVF_C-tsyLXv2_uSY7x01f5IBKmu5ZQr6Ca_UGVSQxHZj1D7fOw8h13QNKvfiUISDgU6Vfh5ABWBckq4Tq3BU2c0tpeB_J2ieDydHrafLA-5OsUh4tkx0qWtZqJ8Ee5tUMFtET_dt88CXX0TGVeVZ0PIBmDZIcSRgw4fPWuAfiH82DSiAIJPaczRRb8Dij3oPShKpMSFlCsML4EKjrcQBJrN5MOx9Jg6HYjQU9lgUjfXxi9xVMnkTWnooFXAjeLwNOptvJkHI7VY1Tv1Whu-8KDDDgloJ-h-qzDWbNiaEFN0QG) Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas, Inc.

name: Susan Collins
subject: I can’t be bribed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
In 2018, the Far Left tried to bribe me. They promised me this: if I voted to confirm Justice Brett Kavanaugh, they would donate millions of dollars to my future opponent. But if I voted against him, the money would go away.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3NDIwNDkS1&kn=15&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTM5NTcxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Dear Peter,
In 2018, the Far Left tried to bribe me.
They promised me this: if I voted to confirm Justice Brett Kavanaugh, they would donate millions of dollars to my future opponent. But if I voted _against_ him, the money would go away.
**Despite the threats, I strongly stood my ground. No sum of money can make me vote a certain way. Make no mistake,_I cannot be bribed._**
Two years later, my opponent is on track to receive a **$4 million dollar boost** once she is officially elected as the Democratic nominee on July 14th. And the fund is still growing...

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3NDIwNDkS1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTM5NTcxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Right now, my campaign is being outraised. In a few weeks, my opponent will receive an additional $4 million solely because I stood my ground. In order to stand a chance against the false attacks and this unprecedented amount of money, I need your support today.
[DONATE TO MY CAMPAIGN](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3NDIwNDkS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTM5NTcxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
This election has proven that some people will stop at nothing to win this seat. [**Can you contribute any amount to my campaign today and help me fight back?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3NDIwNDkS1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTM5NTcxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0) While my opponent has Chuck Schumer, Far Left billionaires, and a chest of $4 million waiting for her in July, I have YOU. Help my campaign catch up!
Thank you for your loyal support,
Susan Collins

Two years later, my opponent is on track to receive a $4 million dollar boost once she is officially elected as the Democratic nominee on July 14th. And the fund is still growing... Right now, my campaign is being outraised. In a few weeks, my opponent will receive an additional $4 million solely because I stood my ground. In order to stand a chance against the false attacks and this unprecedented amount of money, I need your support today. This election has proven that some people will stop at nothing to win this seat. While my opponent has Chuck Schumer, Far Left billionaires, and a chest of $4 million waiting for her in July, I have YOU. Help my campaign catch up! Thank you for your loyal support, Susan Collins Paid for by Collins for Senator P.O. Box 1096 Bangor, ME 04402 Click to unsubscribe from Collins for Senator.

name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: Wildfire Season
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
Friends, Arizona’s wildfire season has just started and we are already facing devastation across our state. Rural Arizonans have long understood how quickly these fires can devastate our communities and upend our lives. The Rodeo-Chediski fire, Wallow Fire, and the Yarnell Hill fire are all events Arizonans will never forget. We must work to ensure they never happen again. The Bighorn fire is burning in Oro Valley and has caused numerous evacuations with many others prepared to leave at a moment’s notice. I know many of you are not affected, but if you are able to help our neighbors who are impacted learn how to do so here >>> [**https://www.kold.com**](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=46a93111d4904c0dbf2216b402d81188&_e=cJooSnMpiT9b79ltjNM6DU_rWuG9Jw7HwXbbIfjjOykMsfcqjvBqRbK7trCBUUcubi6TI9A9AzuE3tD38Ihf7yL6oql25OWfxYReJWXWyO6E0VCAcdzvx7x1JNzMUaIabCAVPca6qqP0dRKPG26jMR2RXLPbUg-YxLXvsfpaNDPI7chMwPwR65cb3dkHubvCsr0HnwBa9S1aNupNsCYJxhhxdLN2E6Pv-iiFBoLWo2CiI_DPPNpmEJxMbOeAf53hgKra5nJqkODQ51NMnms43r4iAIjiO9iujJj4bHArUN2YM444kDqP3jLnAng-roYrA2afpuosnfJp-FJ-EArGjoXgf51-Jb1ufpMYDrhpH5U%3D). The Magnum fire is burning north of the Grand Canyon and the evacuation of Jacob Lake was ordered. Learn more about the fire here >>> **[https://inciweb.nwcg.gov](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=46a93111d4904c0dbf2216b402d81188&_e=cJooSnMpiT9b79ltjNM6DSzLYpokD5hXRHB7ZUK7Jz1z2eC1sV1jTH7kihZ6j8p7KQ0k4yaRACbmff35fNnDlozJUJkT7NIiIm828SA_yMgrSx3PqC9MUiM_DaMMrrLaPlrjDNBGlPLUPZrWcCQmvQeAcg2-000ovoJ6NHtrtktHmx21gytzwcghiL-tzpnMLf-Rfgv1EpYKb--OI43fvAv9UQGnT6HQJQdp7JH4DB8jYwe17QHwhJ0ahfGHnGcJeXCorFNyVSFP5rrUqcjF9g%3D%3D)**. Our first responders are working overtime to combat these violent fires that are happening across our state. Thank you to these brave men and women who put their lives on the line to save us and our property. Arizona has seven large fires burning right now. We must do our part to ensure no more man made fires are started in Arizona. To see a complete map of our wildfires visit here >>> [**https://inciweb.nwcg.gov**](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=46a93111d4904c0dbf2216b402d81188&_e=cJooSnMpiT9b79ltjNM6DSzLYpokD5hXRHB7ZUK7Jz3Qe_kadMPS2XnZSvQQSeV9X_rmvzScfn4R3o4ngnguoj6gke6DMbUTKxN_L4EOFOcI3SJ0w9wFzyNT8whOeSjXnyDTX9wA13tX2iEWOnHVWpcGQt5YqfL_5JPqlLNgAl92RUb3FxDswZf3-xozm3FXxrcOZ3qVsATmrZhvFv3AkM-A0lD_zpC1efyMXR5IuTO1sxbMS-pfc23W_jtlEqcaMJHlfWtXRQ5zqyPenD7w-A%3D%3D). Take care, Tiffany Shedd [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=46a93111d4904c0dbf2216b402d81188&_e=cJooSnMpiT9b79ltjNM6DerClX64Unlu8M8G28lfkPkXBZaUZxFXIy-z3PcEVsUPFoaStD-hi5_TfC_PlGy9CFoiqGazuFoUxKAF3Es7z8rJU1feZL4cUFw47MvOanB6oXJjPcMH5cH6XX133wZfRL4XvejxwMEz09Il3YLdaqM9Ux4cFgDJRbskTt3PojbGeTba9AfoS_cajhvjoATHxF_j8nj2jE3f78AHHCDrA_FzQ5So1-rQyZ1uQ9U8cURq_rmL9DMYGAmGt4zw0gsl1Ma6fhz6n7eckNrKqCWpZoWeOjlS9SYVkdz40_Vt2Wxo2zzp2ARaVSlH69vcKbFHLhw_XXnMCNrmSUeaVYZVQ5ksB-UMHc5zhci15OEYeBY6zKmi2h_liLDKEKfcWxPyS4mZX-1qEacMZkHWXj-CxrjrqC4jvSiOCnRWTKInf907) Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee

#
We wanted to make sure that we reminded you about our upcoming virtual trivia night because you won't want to miss it! The event will kick off this **Thursday, June 18th at 8 pm cst. **

Play as an individual, or play with a team of up to 6!** Individual tickets are just $10, while a team ticket is $50.**

We look forward to seeing you there!

Team Dani

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Incredible Pride Month news!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
From the Supreme Court.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901d3/7f51f7bc/4e9beb59/4ef6ece3/2455016416/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter -- Yesterday, Aimee Stephens and the LGBTQ+ community won a monumental victory at the Supreme Court. **Now LGBTQ+ Americans are legally protected from workplace discrimination.**

This is huge news, and an important step forward, but it isn't the end of our work -- far from it. **[I hope you'll join me in fighting for an America that treats _everyone_ with humanity and dignity.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901d3/7f51f7bc/4e9beb59/4ef6ece2/2455016416/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200616.1nd__1563__&amount=10")**

That's a top priority for me. Unfortunately, Sen. Cornyn feels differently -- he signed an amicus brief in this case arguing that LGBTQ+ people SHOULDN'T be protected at work. Texans deserve better. **[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901d3/7f51f7bc/4e9beb59/4ef6ece2/2455016416/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200616.1nd__1563__&amount=10")** **Look, it 's not just the Senate seat that's at stake this election. It's the Supreme Court, too.**

Yesterday SCOTUS made the right call -- but on so many other issues, it's made the wrong one thanks to justices supported by Senator Cornyn. Today, **Brett Kavanaugh stood up and said that discrimination against the LGBTQ+ community should be an acceptable practice in this country.** We knew his true colors all along, and yet, Sen. Cornyn still supported his nomination to the highest court in the land.

We can't allow any more justices like Kavanaugh to be confirmed to the Supreme Court. As your senator, I'll make sure that everyone who gets on the Court prioritizes the rights of the American people. **[Will you help me get there?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901d3/7f51f7bc/4e9beb59/4ef6ece2/2455016416/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200616.1nd__1563__&amount=10")**

Our campaign has come such a long way. But we only have one month left until the runoff, so we can't slow down. We need to be ready to face Sen. Cornyn head-on without missing a beat.

I know this team always comes through, so let's hit the ground running and make sure we're in the best possible position to win the general election: **[DONATE NOW](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901d3/7f51f7bc/4e9beb59/4ef6ece2/2455016416/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200616.1nd__1563__&amount=10")** We're in this together.

\-- MJ

---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901d3/7f51f7bc/4e9beb59/4ef6ece1/2455016416/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1563&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901d3/7f51f7bc/4e9beb59/4ef6ece0/2455016416/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

name: Greg Stanton
subject: We need to address systemic issues in our nation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
As your Congressman, I support the Americans peacefully protesting to bring change to our country to reform our criminal justice system, empower racial justice, and fix systemic issues in our nation.

**I am committed to working with members of the Black community, law enforcement, and community organizations to support legislation in Washington that addresses racial injustice and keeps our communities safe.**

That's why I am proud to join with my colleagues in the House to support the _Justice in Policing Act_ that will:

- End the use of chokeholds
\- Establish a National Police Misconduct Registry
\- Demilitarize local police departments
\- Ban no-knock warrants for drug-related offenses
\- Create flexibility in the standard for prosecuting violent officers

**But I need your help to build the broad support we need to get this critical bill reforming our criminal justice system passed through Congress!**

[**Will you join me in signing on to this petition in support of the _Justice in Policing Act_ to make real policy change for our communities | SIGN ON »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/jRUJL5TqlbnQPiVV9X6Q84Q7FsYnoMKWgo7JdkeR74M=/NncGIYGk1H949U3HZqsIR24DvT8zfb4Ua8SjlD9rp_k=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/jRUJL5TqlbnQPiVV9X6Q84Q7FsYnoMKWgo7JdkeR74M=/NncGIYGk1H949U3HZqsIR24DvT8zfb4Ua8SjlD9rp_k=)

Thank you for taking action to make our communities safer,

\-- _Greg_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress

name: Pete Buttigieg
subject: I’m proud to lend my support to Josh Hicks
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
If one thing is clear right now, it’s that we need sweeping change in America, friends.

That’s why I’m proud to lend my support to candidates across the country — and I’m proud to support Josh Hicks’ campaign to flip the 6th Congressional District of Kentucky, defeating Andy Barr and helping take down Mitch McConnell.

Will you join me in supporting Josh’s campaign today? He’s running a smart campaign and was just barely outraised by his opponent last quarter.

Chip in now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hicks-june-pete?refcode=20200616_em_fr_buttigieg_all_pt1]

Josh and I are both veterans. And there are a few things we learn in all branches of service: We’re all taught a sense of duty, the desire to fight for a better tomorrow, and the ability to lead folks without leaving anyone behind.

For far too long, Kentuckians have been left behind by Mitch McConnell and Andy Barr’s weak leadership in Washington. They’re fighting for their big donors — not everyday people.

Josh is the type of leader we need in Congress during the hard fights ahead. He’s proven his commitment to service as a US Marine and a Maysville police officer. Now, he’s ready to take that commitment to Washington, and bring about real change for Kentucky.
Josh needs to raise $51,000 from online donations by the end of the quarter to close the fundraising gap between him and his opponent. Can you chip in to Josh’s campaign today, and help finish the work that we started?

Donate >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hicks-june-pete?refcode=20200616_em_fr_buttigieg_all_pt2]

Thank you,
Pete Buttigieg

Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
Josh Hicks for Congress
PO Box 1214
Lexington, KY 40588
United States
Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney.
He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. Please consider making a $5 contribution to Josh’s campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hicks-june-pete?amount=5&refcode=20200616_em_fr_buttigieg_all_ptftr]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hicks-june-pete?refcode=20200616_em_fr_buttigieg_all_ptftr2]

That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. Please consider making a $5 contribution to Josh’s campaign today. [] DONATE [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe:

body:
Yep, you read that right. We're absolutely fed up with the hypocrisy and illegality of Governor Pritzker's ban on gatherings of 10 or more people. [ ](http://links.illinois.gop/u/click?_t=95a5ec09c3af466a98eb0438d7ce84ba&_m=d71893f8531d4375ba0a0877fad17c63&_e=0gRnn8X69uzfSMivnRLREsqXbexrPaRMyUy0sRLkBIowyNIfhAgUv4gssqZ6Pwb4hBEeXMffN9J41vCVI7FbKH1JllRGqnge-jR2dy2OX_ujWZIZJ9GpHv37Abz8SrXgBukNvU_PWVm0taj3znSUQ9I9mssLwJqZf6gZWBn6Hoa-RVO_DqjSxu0fYlPw2K0wXuh8QF_zP4lc8YO_-hQ8u-pBGmSpdwLGZDSqB387M9t1BQrRC7ZfVOfJ_Dg2zZbL) Friend, The Illinois Republican Party is suing Governor JB Pritzker. Yep, you read that right. We're absolutely fed up with the hypocrisy and illegality of Governor Pritzker's ban on gatherings of 10 or more people. While continuing to impose these liberty-limiting restrictions on Illinois residents, Governor Pritzker marched in large-scale rallies and attended gatherings that blatantly violated his own Executive Order. We've had enough. **So we're taking it to court**. [**But we desperately need Illinois Republicans throughout the state to step up and get involved**](http://links.illinois.gop/u/click?_t=95a5ec09c3af466a98eb0438d7ce84ba&_m=d71893f8531d4375ba0a0877fad17c63&_e=0gRnn8X69uzfSMivnRLREr4rpXvbMX6mKCqlZa3dKxdwTDZOgAQI3gWGS0xqeN25Cq55lARFOr3biPBS2Q6kqxZQcy6LtgdJ6nppcc_QDz_C21x_CxslInqciTCt2RxKNlcdaO2KdQmrmPzWY0CxRl_4PTl5JrSZof61hPVsVXm-wdkWq9nUxL3y2VY2pWwt7wBhBQ1nAw4W59uC-jPt5UwfenQFv7KXt59pcuP-zzq9WhlTIHOkJ1ctpWz9iL1OntznU4eLsYmMjF3AZeBY7hZGYAkUo2qCO7bhy3aZqgjYMJ-ZCIt3uifa8yIVue_jCgEawvCyd7D0NBmOMUlVt5Zvj9mPcdGtZeBxqMy7HP1M6nJKnyz_tx6qyI7FohF-). We're expecting Governor Pritzker will throw whatever he needs at this battle to silence it. name: Lisa Scheller
subject: can’t slow down now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
Just over a week ago, our campaign was announced the primary winner for PA-07, meaning we will be officially challenging Far-Left Susan Wild in the Peter, Just over a week ago, our campaign was announced the primary winner for PA-07, meaning we will be officially challenging Far-Left Susan Wild in the general election come November.
Our primary run was a fight, Peter, but our challenge does not end there--we still have a long way to go.
Starting today, my team and I have decided to create the ‘Path to Victory’ fund--a fund that will be created specifically to ensure that we flip PA-07 from a BLUE district to a RED one under my leadership. _**Path to Victory Fund**_ Goal: **$65,289** Status: **SHORT** [**CHIP IN NOW**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=6dc72d4867304c80a6656cfaee264460&_e=3n1YZrE-Gi8E_fiBef1yAah4arQJhfuhImx7a9jocqko6cVZPFtu3WY4DDrq8TXbIuf-WaAK18Vqz_zrW7A9gkyBqgJ1HnyUNjp6xnrtjwC-R9rmKriuI4zk2t06nHEdReBh9-gT-29UJ7OtkwqNuALR-BBlne3Yt3M9tS7fgVW2oZRjz5VUagXXlBNPzItCpYQMW8RcyftaHjdemDquiITgWhkbeII-_-tJQ2ULY0uJpf8jEqIVTl6uuevb0MbYIxqEnAuZOzrQNhGSY63XMyZ5hTwMBd8xIq_ZxB6cl4syWOMetEnMKWSk1w84K6tRpfwkkR5trF2rVfECauqsvi9yi6BQCfIs_VUI8HHr73AmxPxeH8vxUdKaJAn55tuFdYZaSEU63cw6Ojlvscd6iMxE254EG2HkF4I-E39fItCl42TQq5h4f8_VFvwOF7lW) Peter, for the last two years, the Lehigh Valley has been represented by Far-Left Democrats who constantly put partisan politics over the people in their district.

body:
Did you see this email from Josh? We must keep the Senate RED this November, and we need your support. Peter, Did you see this email from Josh? We must keep the Senate **RED** this November, and _**we need your support**_. Steve Daines from Montana needs our help to beat liberal opponent Steve Bullock, who is being funded by Chuck Schumer and other left-wing radicals. name: Cornyn's Retirement Fund
subject: It's time we send him packing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
MJ has the chance to retire Senator Cornyn this November and we're setting up a retirement fund to make it a little easier.

|

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: If it makes sense for you right now, can you split a donation between Joe Biden's campaign and Warren Democrats?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Every day, Donald Trump and his corrupt cronies launch new assaults on civil rights, human dignity, and basic common sense. We have a chance to kick Donald Trump out of office in November, but it's... | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525764/45c30650/1c9ab7cd6/66e9e6cd/2470316484/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
This is a time of tremendous crisis for our nation.

Across the country, Americans are flooding the streets protesting the injustice of police brutality and affirming the unshakable truth that Black Lives Matter.

As the fight for social, racial and economic justice continues, we are fighting to stem the tide of the coronavirus outbreak -- a global pandemic that has taken over 100,000 American lives.

**America is crying out for leadership. But every day, Donald Trump and his corrupt cronies launch new assaults on civil rights, human dignity, and basic common sense.

[We have a chance to kick Donald Trump out of office in November -- but it's going to take a grassroots movement. Can you split a contribution of $2 or whatever you can to support Joe Biden and Warren Democrats, help defeat Trump, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525764/45c30650/1c9ab7cd6/66e9e6cc/2470316484/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWJpZGVuIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVMwOUZfVkpCX0VXRF9FXzIwMjAwNjE2X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-biden?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS09F_VJB_EWD_E_20200616_V1S3_P")**

Five years ago today, Trump came gliding down that escalator in Trump Tower to announce his campaign and every day since he's proven that he cares about one thing and one thing only: Donald Trump.

There's a reason for that.

While growing up in a huge mansion, by the time he was three he was getting a $200,000 a year allowance from his father's real estate empire. In total, he got nearly half a billion dollars from his daddy's empire.

He then spent most of his career running his companies into bankruptcy, stiffing small businesses and hurting his workers before turning to reality TV.

And, by the way, Donald Trump is a misogynist, a man who has spent a big part of his life demeaning and trying to take advantage of women.

Here's why that matters. Your life experience shapes your vision and your values. Donald Trump's life taught him to value only one thing -- himself.

So it is no wonder that his agenda and every action he takes is rooted in stroking his ego. He grows more cruel and heartless by the day, with no accountability to the people he swore to serve.

**But we are not without hope: in just four and a half months, we have the chance to elect a man who will restore the soul of this nation, Joe Biden.**

Joe grew up on the ragged edge of the middle class in Scranton. He committed to public service early in life and never stopped serving. He's faced unspeakable tragedy with fortitude and grace. And these experiences animate him and the empathy he extends to Americans who are struggling -- no matter what their story.

After spending nearly his entire life in public service, he knows that a government run with integrity, competence, and compassion will save lives and save livelihoods.

Joe Biden has a heart for people. And at a time when Donald Trump's agenda grows more cruel and heartless by the day, we need a man in the White House who has spent his entire life fighting for people. We need a president who knows that no citizen is above the law. We need steady and competent leadership.

This is a moment of crisis, but I wake up every morning with a heart full of optimism because I believe that this November, not only are we going to elect Joe Biden but we are going to elect Democrats up and down the ballot, hold the House, take back the Senate, and begin making big, structural change in January 2021.

**It's going to take a lot of hard work and resources to make that happen.

[So if it makes sense for you right now, can you split a donation between Joe Biden's campaign and Warren Democrats? We need Joe to be the next president of the United States to heal this nation and save our democracy.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525764/45c30650/1c9ab7cd6/66e9e6cc/2470316484/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWJpZGVuIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVMwOUZfVkpCX0VXRF9FXzIwMjAwNjE2X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-biden?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS09F_VJB_EWD_E_20200616_V1S3_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525764/45c30650/1c9ab7cd6/66e9e6cc/2470316484/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWJpZGVuIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVMwOUZfVkpCX0VXRF9FXzIwMjAwNjE2X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-biden?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS09F_VJB_EWD_E_20200616_V1S3_P")
---

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525764/45c30650/1c9ab7cd6/66e9e523/2470316484/VEsEDQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525764/45c30650/1c9ab7cd6/66e9e522/2470316484/VEsEDA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525764/45c30650/1c9ab7cd6/66e9e525/2470316484/VEsFBQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525764/45c30650/1c9ab7cd6/66e9e524/2470316484/VEsFBA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525764/45c30650/1c9ab7cd6/66e9e527/2470316484/VEsFBw/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525764/45c30650/1c9ab7cd6/66e9e526/2470316484/VEsFBg/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")
---|---|---|---|---|---

body:

subject: Crunch Time: We need your help
body:
|
---
| | Peter, **There are just NINE days until early voting** starts in the CD-5 Congressional Primary. Less than two weeks until Election Day! [**Team Janet**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=5f0f5bec14&e=795c6d9796) is growing rapidly by the day and we have BIG momentum. We are working night and day to get Janet elected, defeat Kendra Horn, and return a conservative voice to Oklahoma's 5th Congressional District. AMERICA FIRST. Thanks so much again for choosing to join Janet's winning team! As we are drawing closer and closer toward Election Day, [we really need volunteers](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=93cbb2b3b9&e=795c6d9796) to help us get the word out more than ever. Here are [three quick ways you can get involved](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=9191f4dabc&e=795c6d9796):
1. **Help us block walk** and drop literature
2. **Make phone calls** in your local area
3. **Get a yard sign** and [help us put out signs in your area](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=3a972d5ed6&e=795c6d9796)

If you could respond to this email with a 1, 2, 3, or ALL, as well as a good contact number and times best to reach you this week, I will reach out as soon as possible. I encourage you to **share this message** with any friends and family who would be interested in helping Janet become our next conservative fighter in Congress. A little time goes a LONG way, but [we need as many people to help as possible.](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=5d78d3a3eb&e=795c6d9796) Please feel free to forward this email to them with my contact email [**Sean@Janet2020.com**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=1b8683adfe&e=795c6d9796), or [send them to our website](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=28fe7c94b3&e=795c6d9796) so they can get signed up. Thank you for your support and I look forward to hearing from you!

Sean Rose
Grassroots Engagement & Communications Advisor
Janet Barresi for Congress 2020
[www.janet2020.com](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=a430d91638&e=795c6d9796)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump signs executive order on safe policing
body:
President Trump took historic action today to deliver safety and security for Americans of every race and background. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6125763a3f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • June 16, 2020
---
| | |
# **President Trump signs order on safe policing**

**Moments after** he met with families who have lost loved ones to violence—many involving deadly interactions with the police—President Trump took historic action today to deliver safety and security for Americans of every race and background.

**“We are one** **nation** —we grieve together, and we heal together,” he said.

**Today’s executive order** pursues common-sense reforms to public safety while rejecting fringe, anti-police demands. “I strongly oppose the radical and dangerous effort to defund, dismantle, and dissolve our police departments–especially now when we've achieved the lowest recorded crime rates in recent history,” the President said.

🎬 [**President Trump: Restoring, renewing, and rebuilding our communities**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2c7a3893bc&e=3ee4985eea "https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1272972387034771456")

**“Many of the same politicians** now presenting themselves as the solution are the same ones who have failed for decades on schools, jobs, justice, and crime. They’re all often, unfortunately, the same politicians running the cities and states where help is most needed.”

**Americans both support** the brave men and women in blue _and_ believe we must improve accountability, increase transparency, and invest more in law enforcement training. President Trump’s actions today recognize and build on these goals:

1. **Certification:** The Justice Department will now allocate certain funding only to law enforcement agencies that meet high standards for use-of-force and de-escalation, as credentialed by reputable independent bodies. As part of this new credentialing, chokeholds will be banned except if an officer’s life is at risk.

2. **Information sharing:** The Attorney General will create a database for federal, state, and local law enforcement to track terminations, criminal convictions, and civil judgments against law enforcement officers for excessive use-of-force.

3. **Mental health:** To protect both officers and our most vulnerable populations, the Administration will prioritize training for police and social workers who respond to incidents involving the mentally ill, addicted, and homeless.

4. **Legislative action:** The Administration will develop and propose new legislation to Congress to build on these policies and boost community engagement.

**Reducing crime** and raising police standards are not opposing goals, President Trump said. Today’s executive order protects decent, law-abiding officers while holding those who abuse their badge accountable for their actions.

🎬 [President Trump: We will reduce crime AND raise standards! ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7e6a2afec4&e=3ee4985eea)

**Safer communities** mean safer work for our law enforcement officers, too. Last year alone, 89 officers were killed in the line of duty. In recent days, two members of law enforcement were killed amid riots and looting. Hundreds more were injured.

**“The vast majority** of police officers are selfless and courageous public servants,” President Trump said. “When others run away from danger, police run straight into harm’s way, often putting their lives at stake to protect someone who they don’t know or never even met.”

**Violent crime** in America is falling under President Trump, and we have brave law enforcement officers to thank for it. In 2018, police arrested nearly 12,000 people for murder and manslaughter, about 25,000 for rape, and nearly 1.5 million for assault.

**In many cases,** local law enforcement is underfunded, understaffed, and under-supported. The last thing our country needs to do is to make the jobs of good, decent police officers more difficult. The far-left’s radical agenda proposes doing just that.

**President Trump’s** executive order today brings law enforcement and their communities closer together. Calls to defund policing will only drive them further apart.

[See President Trump’s executive order on safe policing](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fe82f79238&e=3ee4985eea)

**WATCH** : [President Trump’s full remarks from the Rose Garden](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f9dbf21623&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump signs an executive order on safe policing for safe communities** | June 16, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d721e78ebf&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4cb686e2f8&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=ddcac0966d)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Christy Smith
subject: This is a humanitarian issue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

Despite being a nurse for many years, my mom couldn't afford her own insulin.

She rationed her prescriptions. She didn't tell my brothers and me what was happening so we could help. And we lost her far too early because of it. I carry that loss with me every day.

It's simply unacceptable that drug manufacturers are able to hike up the cost of life-saving medicines for corporate gains. That our government has done nothing to solve this problem is unacceptable, too.

**No one should have to do this, ever. Congress CAN and SHOULD solve this right away.**

**[Please join me and demand Congress pass legislation to get prescription drug prices under control. No one should lose their life because they can't afford insulin or any other life-saving drug.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba66/29776869/9a14eb6/569f37ad/755606528/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MTZfaGVhbHRoY2FyZXB0LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://christysmith.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/2006_email_smith_healthcare?source=em20_200616_healthcarept-full")** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba66/29776869/9a14eb6/569f37ad/755606528/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MTZfaGVhbHRoY2FyZXB0LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://christysmith.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/2006_email_smith_healthcare?source=em20_200616_healthcarept-full") The House of Representatives passed the Lower Drug Costs Now Act last year, but the Senate has not acted on the measure.

This issue should not be partisan. This is not a matter of political wagering. **This issue is humanitarian.**

My mom, who worked as a nurse with patients who had HIV, who helped save other people's lives, couldn't afford to save her own. Without access to health insurance for a number of years, and even once she qualified for Medicaid, she didn't have a single month of her life where she could afford her insulin.

**We can't let our parents, our neighbors, our children suffer like this. Not any day longer.**

**[The time to act is now -- add your name onto our petition calling for Congress to act right now to solve the prescription drug cost crisis.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba66/29776869/9a14eb6/569f37ad/755606528/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MTZfaGVhbHRoY2FyZXB0LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://christysmith.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/2006_email_smith_healthcare?source=em20_200616_healthcarept-full")** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba66/29776869/9a14eb6/569f37ad/755606528/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MTZfaGVhbHRoY2FyZXB0LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://christysmith.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/2006_email_smith_healthcare?source=em20_200616_healthcarept-full") Thank you for standing up for what is right.

\-- Christy

|
[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba66/29776869/9a14eb6/569f37ae/755606528/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MTZfaGVhbHRoY2FyZXB0LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200616_healthcarept-full")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this battleground House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba66/29776869/9a14eb6/569f37ae/755606528/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MTZfaGVhbHRoY2FyZXB0LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200616_healthcarept-full")

[**Contact us here**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba66/29776869/9a14eb6/569f37a9/755606528/VEsP/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/contact"). |
clean_body: | []() | | Peter -- Despite being a nurse for many years, my mom couldn't afford her own insulin. She rationed her prescriptions. She didn't tell my brothers and me what was happening so we could help. And we lost her far too early because of it. I carry that loss with me every day. It's simply unacceptable that drug manufacturers are able to hike up the cost of life-saving medicines for corporate gains. That our government has done nothing to solve this problem is unacceptable, too. No one should have to do this, ever. Congress CAN and SHOULD solve this right away. "" "" The House of Representatives passed the Lower Drug Costs Now Act last year, but the Senate has not acted on the measure. This issue should not be partisan. This is not a matter of political wagering. This issue is humanitarian. My mom, who worked as a nurse with patients who had HIV, who helped save other people's lives, couldn't afford to save her own. Without access to health insurance for a number of years, and even once she qualified for Medicaid, she didn't have a single month of her life where she could afford her insulin. We can't let our parents, our neighbors, our children suffer like this. Not any day longer. "" "" Thank you for standing up for what is right. \-- Christy | "" Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this battleground House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. "" | | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress. ---|--- |
